name: Analog Devices, Inc.
h1: Analog Devices's GCC footprint in India
lede: Analog Devices runs two capability centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and sales & marketing, built over 31 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Analog Devices office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Analog Devices, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Analog Devices runs 2 verified GCC centers in Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Managing Director/VP Engineering - Global Head of Digital Business Unit Silicon Execution

about.description: Analog Devices's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 27 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Analog Devices operate in India?
faq.a: Analog Devices operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Analog Devices have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Analog Devices's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Analog Devices run in India?
faq.a: Analog Devices runs engineering & design and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Analog Devices's India GCCs?
faq.a: Analog Devices's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Analog Devices's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 27 leaders at Analog Devices's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
